name: Customer Complaint Email Logger
description: Gmail search for complaint keywords, deterministic dedup via set_difference against existing Gmail message IDs already in the Sheet, append new complaint rows to Google Sheets (sender_email, subject, date, full_email_text, gmail_message_link_id). Tests the full Sheets read→filter→project→dedup→append cascade plus WP-24's content_level=full auto-application for body fetching. Prerequisite: destination sheet must have a header row in row 1 (workaround for WP-26 — auto-injected rows_to_objects consumes row 0 as header).
